description: Decentralized AI inference (weather, deepfake detection, LLMs) with x402 USDC micropayments.
name: io.github.telegraphprotocol/telegraph

environmentVariables.description: Telegraph node public API URL (e.g. http://13.237.89.59:7044)
environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAPH_NODE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Telegraph Engine inference server URL (e.g. http://13.237.89.59:8080)
environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAPH_ENGINE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Telegraph Daemon signal API URL (e.g. http://13.237.89.59:8081)
environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAPH_DAEMON_URL

environmentVariables.description: EVM private key (0x-prefixed hex) of a USDC-funded burner wallet used to sign x402 payments. At least one of TELEGRAPH_EVM_PRIVATE_KEY or TELEGRAPH_SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY is required.
environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAPH_EVM_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Solana private key (base58) for SVM x402 payments. Optional alternative to TELEGRAPH_EVM_PRIVATE_KEY.
environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAPH_SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: CAIP-2 network identifier for EVM payments. Defaults to eip155:*.
environmentVariables.name: EVM_NETWORK

environmentVariables.description: CAIP-2 network identifier for Solana payments. Defaults to solana:*.
environmentVariables.name: SVM_NETWORK

environmentVariables.description: Dynamic miner-tool refresh interval in milliseconds. Defaults to 300000 (5 min). Set to 0 to disable.
environmentVariables.name: REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS
